title: Verify the presence of social networks in the list
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Verify that the list contains the following social networks: Facebook, Google+, Twitter, VKontakte.
expected_result: The list should display the specified social networks.

title: Verify the functionality of the green plus sign next to each social network
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Click on the green plus sign next to each social network. | Verify that clicking the green plus sign adds the social network to the application.
expected_result: The social network should be successfully added to the application.

title: Verify that the back arrow in the header navigates back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify that the application navigates back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The application should navigate back to the previous screen.

title: Verify data persistence when the application is closed and reopened
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Add a social network by clicking the green plus sign. | Close the application and reopen it. | Verify that the added social network is still present in the list.
expected_result: The added social network should still be present in the list.

title: Verify that the screen is accessible and usable
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Perform a usability test to ensure the screen is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: All elements should be accessible and the screen should be easy to navigate and understand.

title: Verify that the screen handles interruptions and resumes correctly
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the 'Social Networks' screen. | Simulate an interruption by closing the application. | Resume the application and verify that the 'Social Networks' screen is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The 'Social Networks' screen should be displayed correctly after resuming the application.
